title: HOZELOCK - Rectangular Sprinkler Plus 220 M: Ultra Coverage, Sprinkler on Sled, Ideal for Lawns, Adjustable Oscillation Zone: 16 Jets For Uniform Watering [100-100-250]
features: Flow control allows you to save water, turn off at the sprinkler rather than the tap
description: From the manufacturer Rectangular Sprinkler Plus 220 M A robust water-driven oscillating sprinkler featuring flow control and offering ultra even coverage, perfect for square or rectangular spaces. Introducing the Rectangular Sprinkler Plus 220 M Why Choose This Sprinkler? The Rectangular Sprinkler Plus 220 M is a high-performance water-driven oscillating sprinkler equipped with flow control for precise water adjustment right at the head. It provides uniform coverage for gardens of any size, with adjustable water flow, a sturdy sled base for even watering, and durable construction for long-lasting use. No more uneven and inefficient garden watering! The Rectangular Sprinkler Plus 220 M delivers even and efficient watering for rectangular or square garden areas, ensuring every spot gets the water it needs. Perfect for gardens of all sizes, it features adjustable water flow and reliable performance, making it easy to keep your landscape healthy and lush. Key Benefits Include: Adjust water flow directly at the sprinkler for precise watering tailored to your garden’s needs. The advanced sled design ensures even, thorough garden coverage with consistent watering. Constructed with high-quality materials, this sprinkler offers reliable performance for many years. Adjust the water jets' direction with the oscillation control for your garden's needs. Key Features Adjustable Flow Control You can easily control the water flow, targeting specific areas whether you're watering a small garden or a large outdoor space. A 220m² Max Coverage This 16-jet Rectangular Sprinkler features an ultra-reliable, water-powered gear drive motor that works efficiently under various water pressures. Adjustable Direction Adjust the water jets' direction with the red setting ring on this Rectangular Sprinkler, tailored to your garden's specific needs.
